text:
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners" is a well-known, real GPT-2 paper published in 2019 via the OpenAI blog, with authors Alec Radford, Jeffrey Wu, Rewon Child, David Luan, Dario Amodei, and Ilya Sutskever — exactly matching the cited reference. It is hosted directly on OpenAI's CDN and widely indexed, despite not appearing in traditional academic databases like arXiv or CrossRef (as it was an OpenAI blog post, not a journal submission).
LINK: https://cdn.openai.com/better-language-models/language_models_are_unsupervised_multitask_learners.pdf
